mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in the unemployment rate signals tightening labor market conditions that boost corporate profit margins, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE declines by >0.5pp over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month increase in industrial production signals expanding manufacturing activity that drives equity earnings growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances where INDPRO increases by >1.5% over 2 months.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and housing starts signals strong consumer demand that drives corporate revenue growth, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 40% of instances where both GDPC1 and HOUST show positive growth.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in inflation above 3% signals central bank hawkishness that increases equity discount rates, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of instances where CPIAUCSL increases by >3% over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month increase in payroll employment combined with declining unemployment signals robust labor market dynamics that drive consumer spending, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 45% of instances where PAYEMS increases and UNRATE decreases simultaneously.

mechanism_narrative: A 2-month decline in consumer credit availability signals reduced household spending power that depresses equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances where RSAFS declines over 2 months.

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in industrial production combined with falling capacity utilization signals overheating supply chains that increase inflationary pressures, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 55% of instances where INDPRO increases and FEDFUNDS rises simultaneously.
